title: Upon Woman And Mary.
content:
So long, it seem'd, as Mary's faith was small,
    Christ did her woman, not her Mary call;
    But no more woman, being strong in faith,
    But Mary call'd then, as St. Ambrose saith.
meaning:
"Upon Woman And Mary." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
